nodes.name: 玻利維亞
nodes.summary: 玻利維亞是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联770种鸟类，包括大美洲鸵、北山䳍、白腹拟䳍等770种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Bolivian warbling finch
nodes.summary: The Bolivian warbling finch (Poospiza boliviana) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Argentina and Bolivia. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland. References
nodes.shortSummary: The Bolivian warbling finch (Poospiza boliviana) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Argentina and Bolivia.
